author: insync_21
title: Thank you devs
content:
I have tested a bunch of music players and this has been a breakthrough.
lets you play basically any music downloaded to the device, manage/create playlists and also has a built in EQ.

author: andrea_fj
title: Awsome app
content: I personally recommend iPhone users to use this app! It’s FREE guys and no problem faced while using this app! You can listen both online and offline ❤️❤️❤️

author: Goneniloma
title: Awesome App
content: Learnt of this app from a tik tok video. Soo far soo good.
